channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Black Market Dollar to Naira Exchange Rates for July 24th, 2026
item.description: The article reports on the current dollar-to-naira exchange rates in Nigeria's black market (Aboki fx) as of July 24th, 2026. According to sources at Bureau De Change (BDC), Lagos Parallel Market play...

item.title: Pastor Convicted of Stealing KSh 44m from Churches
item.description: A pastor in Louisiana, Dale Sanders, has been found guilty of diverting over KSh 44 million from two Baptist churches he led between 2020 and 2024. Prosecutors revealed he used the stolen funds for pe...

item.title: Durban Lifeguards Demonstrate Water Safety Skills Ahead of World Drowning Prevention Day
item.description: Durban lifeguards will demonstrate their essential skills at the Rachel Finlayson Swimming Pool on Friday to commemorate World Drowning Prevention Day on Saturday. The event, organized by the eThekwin...

item.title: Southport Murderer Transferred to High-Security Psychiatric Care After Mass Attack
item.description: Axel Rudakubana, the perpetrator of a deadly attack at a Taylor Swift-themed dance class in Southport that killed three children and injured nine others, has been transferred from HMP Belmarsh to Broa...

item.title: Manila's Decline in QS Best Student Cities Rankings
item.description: Manila has slipped out of the top 100 in the latest QS Best Student Cities Rankings, dropping to 102nd place in the 2027 edition released by Quacquarelli Symonds (QS). This marks a significant decline...

item.title: Ottawa Weekend Events: July 24-26 Highlights
item.description: The article provides a roundup of events and activities happening in Ottawa during the weekend of July 24-26, 2026. It highlights a variety of cultural, social, and recreational opportunities, includi...

item.title: ACT Labor faces cabinet reshuffle after Yvette Berry's resignation
item.description: Yvette Berry's resignation as ACT Labor's sports minister has triggered speculation about her potential replacement. The decision comes amid an ACT Integrity Commission investigation, with challenges ...

item.title: Senegal's Birame Diop Appointed ECOWAS Commission President, Highlighting Strategic Military and Diplomatic Background
item.description: Birame Diop, a Senegalese general with a distinguished military career, has been appointed as the incoming president of the Economic Community of West African States (ECOWAS) Commission, effective 1 S...

item.title: Google Expands Gemini Live to First-Gen Smart Speakers
item.description: Google is expanding its Gemini Live AI assistant to include first-generation smart speakers and displays. The update allows users with Google Home Mini and Nest Hub devices to engage in conversational...

item.title: Delhi High Court to urgently hear challenge to internet shutdown around Jantar Mantar student protest
item.description: The Delhi High Court has agreed to urgently hear a petition challenging the suspension of internet services within a 1.5-kilometre radius of Jantar Mantar, where students have been staging protests de...

item.title: Political Pressure Mounts on Kenya's President Ruto to Replace Deputy Kindiki
item.description: The article discusses the growing political tension in Kenya surrounding President William Ruto's decision to retain Deputy President Kithure Kindiki as his running mate for the 2027 general election....

item.title: Pakistan Urges Elimination of Afghanistan-Linked Terrorism for Regional Stability
item.description: Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar emphasized at the Shanghai Cooperation Organisation (SCO) Council of Foreign Ministers’ meeting that durable peace and stability in the region can ...

item.title: Anthony Joshua prepares for comeback fight after grieving friends' deaths
item.description: Anthony Joshua, the British heavyweight boxer, is preparing for his much-anticipated comeback fight against IBF champion Daniel Dubois after enduring a difficult period marked by the tragic deaths of ...

item.title: Antisemitism and Community Safety: Julian Leeser's Concerns for His Son's Future
item.description: Jewish Liberal MP Julian Leeser addressed the Royal Commission on Antisemitism and Social Cohesion, sharing his eight-year-old son's fear of attending a synagogue following the Bondi terror attack. Le...

item.title: Somali Pirates Hijack Tanzanian Tanker, Move It to Somalia's Puntland Region
item.description: Suspected Somali pirates have seized a Tanzanian-flagged chemical tanker named MT ASANA in the Gulf of Aden. The incident occurred on Friday as the vessel departed Mukalla, Yemen. Seven armed pirates ...

item.title: 7 Sustainable Brands Promoting Eco-Friendly Living and Wellness
item.description: The article highlights seven brands that are leading the charge in sustainable living, beauty, and wellness. These brands focus on eco-friendly practices, ethical sourcing, and holistic approaches to ...

item.title: Education Challenges and Progress in the Philippines After SONA 2025
item.description: The article discusses the Philippines' ongoing efforts to address education challenges one year after the 2025 SONA (State of the Nation Address). While the government has implemented reforms such as ...

item.title: King Charles Opens Commonwealth Games in Glasgow
item.description: King Charles III officially opened the Commonwealth Games in Glasgow on July 24, 2026, marking a scaled-back version of the multi-sport event due to ongoing global challenges. The ceremony, held at Ce...

item.title: Blanchard's last-second 57-yard field goal caps Fajardo's 510-yard performance as Edmonton defeats Saskatchewan
item.description: The Edmonton Elks strengthened their position atop the CFL West Division with a dramatic 36-34 victory over the Saskatchewan Roughriders at Mosaic Stadium in Regina. Quarterback Cody Fajardo delivered...

item.title: Sustainable Energy Transition in South Africa: Lessons from the Limpopo Solar Farm Project
item.description: The article explores the complexities of implementing renewable energy projects in rural South Africa, using a solar farm in Limpopo as a case study. While the project aims to promote green energy and...
